name: One-Bowl Buttercream Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixer bowl, beat the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar and cocoa to the butter, alternating with milk, mixing after each addition.
3. Continue beating until the frosting reaches a spreading consistency. Add more milk if needed.
Variation:
Chocolate Cupcakes: Fill paper-lined muffin cups (2-1/2 inches in diameter) about 2/3 full with batter. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool completely before frosting. About 2-1/2 dozen cupcakes.
